rulings.Case Title: AS YOU SOW VS ADG CONCERNS INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Demurrer Hrg By Deft Adg Concerns, Inc. To Complt, Calendar Motion: Demurrer, Calendar Motion: Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Requests for Judicial Notice. -Requests for judicial notice of notices given to ADG and BRION: GRANT because there is no dispute as to existence and form of notice. -Request for judicial notice of notice given to LOTUS: DENY because contents of notice is disputed. Demurrer 1st cause of action Violation of Prop 65 [H&S25249.6]: -OVERRULE as to ADG and BRION because notices are sufficient and complaint does not violate due process. -OVERRULE as to LOTUS because complaint alleges compliance with notice requirement and the complaint does not violate due process. 2nd cause of action Violation of B&P17200 based upon violation of Prop 65; 3rd cause of action Violation of B&P17200 based upon violation of Sherman Act; and 4th cause of action Violation of B&P17200. -OVERRULE as to ADG and BRION because notices are sufficient; the 3rd & 4th causes of action are not dependent on proper Prop 65 Notice; and the complaint is not uncertain. -OVERRULE as to LOTUS because complaint alleges compliance with notice requirement; the 3rd & 4th causes of action are not dependent on proper Prop 65 Notice; and the complaint is not uncertain. (CW)
CONTINUED TO 12/12/01: MOVING PARTY TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES PER LOCAL RULE 8.5. PLEASE ATTACH COVER LETTER CONFIRMING NEW HEARING DATE. ALSO TO LODGE COURTESY COPY OF PLEADING UNDER ATTACK.
